item.title: A Small Holdfast Change for Smoother Setup
item.description: A small change can make your setup feel a lot smoother in the shop. #holdfast #blackbearforge

media:content.media:title: A Small Holdfast Change for Smoother Setup
media:content.media:description: A small change can make your setup feel a lot smoother in the shop. #holdfast #blackbearforge

item.title: Forge Welding Pointers in the Shop
item.description: Dave stopped by the shop for forge welding pointers, and he seems to be on the right track. A practical look at blacksmithing technique and shop craft.

media:content.media:title: Forge Welding Pointers in the Shop
media:content.media:description: Dave stopped by the shop for forge welding pointers, and he seems to be on the right track. A practical look at blacksmithing technique and shop craft.

item.title: Heat Color Tells the Story
item.description: That one shift in the glow says more than a thermometer ever could.

media:content.media:title: Heat Color Tells the Story
media:content.media:description: That one shift in the glow says more than a thermometer ever could.

item.title: Why Good Blind Rivets Start Here
item.description: A simple setup change can make the whole job feel cleaner in metalworking and fabrication.

media:content.media:title: Why Good Blind Rivets Start Here
media:content.media:description: A simple setup change can make the whole job feel cleaner in metalworking and fabrication.

item.title: A Small Twist Change, Big Difference
item.description: One small change in the twist makes the whole piece land differently. A simple blacksmithing detail with a satisfying result.

media:content.media:title: A Small Twist Change, Big Difference
media:content.media:description: One small change in the twist makes the whole piece land differently. A simple blacksmithing detail with a satisfying result.

item.title: A Small Tweak in the Forge
item.description: A small tweak in the forge turns spring steel into something useful.

media:content.media:title: A Small Tweak in the Forge
media:content.media:description: A small tweak in the forge turns spring steel into something useful.

item.title: Metal Shifts in the Fire
item.description: Watch the metal shift in the fire and hear the shop problem disappear.

media:content.media:title: Metal Shifts in the Fire
media:content.media:description: Watch the metal shift in the fire and hear the shop problem disappear.

item.title: Smart Vise Setup for Smoother Work
item.description: A small fixture change can make every job smoother in the shop. A practical vise setup tip for blacksmithing and metalworking.

media:content.media:title: Smart Vise Setup for Smoother Work
media:content.media:description: A small fixture change can make every job smoother in the shop. A practical vise setup tip for blacksmithing and metalworking.
